title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
Alphabet & Tesla Q2 earnings released after close — results now public, calls start 5:30 PM ET
Gold +1.5% (24h) → ~$4,135/oz — safe-haven bid extends as US-Iran strikes enter Day 11
Oil at $87–88/bbl (6-week high) — WTI up further on threat of broader US military action vs Iran
